token_budget.description: Default token budget for context assembly. Default: 8000.

auto_archive.description: Whether to auto-archive completed tasks. Default: true.

archive_after_days.description: Days before archiving completed tasks. Default: 7.

scratchpad_encrypt.description: Whether to encrypt the scratchpad. Default: true.

entry_count_learnings.description: Entry count threshold for LEARNINGS.md drift warning. Default: 30. 0 disables.

entry_count_decisions.description: Entry count threshold for DECISIONS.md drift warning. Default: 20. 0 disables.

convention_line_count.description: Line count threshold for CONVENTIONS.md drift warning. Default: 200. 0 disables.

injection_token_warn.description: Token threshold for oversize injection warning. Default: 15000. 0 disables.

context_window.description: Context window size in tokens. Auto-detected for Claude Code users. Default: 200000.

event_log.description: Whether to log hook events locally. Default: false.

key_rotation_days.description: Days before encryption key rotation nudge. Default: 90.

stale_age_days.description: Days before a context file is flagged as stale by drift detection. Default: 30. 0 disables.

billing_token_warn.description: Absolute token threshold for billing nudge. One-shot warning when session tokens exceed this value. Default: 0 (disabled).

task_nudge_interval.description: Edit/Write calls between task completion nudges. Default: 5. 0 disables.

session_prefixes.description: Recognized session header prefixes for Markdown parser. Default: ["Session:"].

freshness_files.description: Source files containing technology-dependent constants for periodic review.

path.description: File path relative to the project root.

desc.description: Summary of what constants live in the file.

review_url.description: Optional URL to check against when reviewing.

companion_check.description: Check companion tool availability (Gemini Search, GitNexus) during /ctx-remember. Default: true. Set false to suppress.

classify_rules.description: Custom keyword rules for memory entry classification. Overrides built-in defaults when set. Rules are evaluated in priority order.

target.description: Target entry type (convention, decision, learning, task).

spec_signal_words.description: Terms in task descriptions that suggest the task needs a design spec. Overrides built-in defaults when set.

spec_nudge_min_len.description: Task content length above which a spec nudge fires regardless of signal words. Default: 150.

placeholders.description: Extra placeholder strings rejected by `ctx decision add` / `ctx learning add` body-flag validators. EXTEND semantics: entries are appended to the shipped defaults (loaded from the embedded en.yaml), not replacing them. Useful for project vocabulary like Tarzan Turkish (`iptal`, `yapılacak`) where the user wants the shipped English list to keep applying. Matching is Unicode case-fold-insensitive after whitespace trimming; substring matches are accepted as legitimate prose. Empty entries are skipped.

provenance_required.description: Controls which provenance flags are required for ctx add. Default: all true. Set to false to relax per-project.

tool.description: Active AI tool identifier (e.g., claude, cursor, cline, kiro, codex).

dir.description: Path override for the steering directory.

default_inclusion.description: Default inclusion mode for new steering files.

default_tools.description: Default tool identifier list for new steering files.

dir.description: Path override for the hooks directory.

timeout.description: Per-hook execution timeout in seconds. Default: 10.

enabled.description: Whether hook execution is enabled. Default: true.

dream.description: ctx-dream memory-consolidation settings. Opt-in: nothing runs until enabled is true and a cron entry is installed.

enabled.description: Master switch for the dream. Default: false (opt-in).

mode.description: Execution mode. Default: discipline. creative is deferred.

max.description: Ceiling on ideas/ files processed per pass. Default: 50.

cadence.description: Cron schedule for the nightly pass (e.g. '30 2 * * *').

quiet_minutes.description: Activity quiet window the trigger gate honors. Default: 60.

model.description: Executor model override. Empty uses the session default.

executor.description: Executor command template. Empty uses the reference claude -p invocation.
